title: coleus briquetii
intro: Coleus briquetii, also known as the "Kashmir coleus", is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Coleus briquetii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract the active compounds.
